work_unit: 瞭望轮#42: scout快照+fix-worktree behind状态复检 (BLOCKED on human merge)
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=fix-in-progress, derived_fixes pending_count=9。scout-scan 推荐 #1 autonomous-studio-aone (review 10 待合并 worktree)。main HEAD=bab0a23 与上轮一致无新源码提交。9 fix worktree + optimization worktree 全部 behind=6 ahead=1（从上轮 behind=0/4 恶化，因中间 state-only commit 累积）。所有 fix 已 origin push 同步。BLOCKED on human merge 已连续 40+ 轮无源码改动。
action: 跑 scout-scan 拿健康快照；遍历 9 个 opt-* worktree 验证 behind/ahead；检查 optimization worktree 内容确认仅 state/case JSON 无可推进源码工作。判定卡死保护条件满足（同 blocked 状态连续 N 轮无进展），本轮不做 rebase（避免再推高 behind 数），仅写瞭望 case 记录状态。
outcome_evidence: scout-scan 输出 score=0.0 + 推荐 review 10 worktree；git worktree list 显示 10 个 opt-* worktree 全存在；for 循环 rev-list 实测 9 fix worktree behind=6 ahead=1；optimization worktree git diff main..HEAD --stat 仅 .claude/{decisions,memory} JSON 文件变更无源码。main HEAD=bab0a23 与上轮 e91a9fe→bab0a23 间仅 state-commit。
next_suggestion: 用户审 diff 后 merge/reject 9 个 fix worktree（opt-security-shift-*/opt-scripts-shift-*/opt-engine-shift-*），解除 BLOCKED
merge 完成后 audit-cycle-state.pending_count 归零 → status=cycle-complete → 下轮触发新一轮全量审计（挑未审过的项目/module）
若用户持续不 merge，引擎保持瞭望轮最小开销（不再 rebase 避免 behind 数字膨胀），等用户动作
